title: main development object
text: main development object A root object for a collection of development objects that together form a self-contained application unit such as a Project, Modeled Entity, Component, or Library. Each main development object has its own editor that is used to define it and its subobjects. Related Links Main Development Object A Main Development Object is a Development Object that has no parent object, is maintained using a dedicated editor, and can be saved and exported as a single unit, with all its children.
